architecture_decision: APPROVE_WITH_EXCEPTIONS for current VS3-L local/on-prem architecture direction only. This record allows continued local/on-prem VS3 development and the next human reviews. It does not approve VS3-P, production/on-prem readiness, independent security acceptance, real IdP readiness, live provider readiness, real network readiness, migration/restore readiness, or human UX acceptance.
dependency_decision: No additional production dependency approval is granted by this record. Existing committed VS3-L local/dev dependency scope may remain for now. Any new production or security-sensitive dependency requires separate review.
migration_rollback_owner: JiYong / Tars owns the current follow-up decision for this limited approval. Production-like migration, restore, and rollback ownership remains subject to VS3-H07 evidence.
redaction_note: No raw secrets, provider credentials, private keys, session cookies, bearer tokens, live provider payloads, or unredacted production data are included. This record captures only the owner chat decision and repo-local evidence references.
security_owner: JiYong / Tars owns this limited current-scope approval. Independent security review remains required under VS3-H02 before any security acceptance or VS3-P claim.
